site.name: Nehmat Bakery
products.label: Our Products
products.heading: Freshly Made, Every Day
products.subtext: From golden Taftoon bread to rich dairy delights — every item crafted with honest ingredients and generations of know-how.
about.teaser.label: Our Story
about.teaser.heading: A Home Built on Bread & Love
about.teaser.body: Nehmat Bakery was born from a simple belief: that the best food comes from patient hands, honest ingredients, and a genuine love for the craft. Our traditional Taftoon breads are baked fresh each morning, and our dairy products are made from locally sourced milk — nothing added, nothing compromised.
why.label: Why Nehmat?
why.heading: Quality You Can Taste
why.subtext: Four reasons our neighbours keep coming back, morning after morning.
why.1.title: Pure Ingredients
why.1.body: No preservatives, no artificial additives. Just flour, water, and time.
why.2.title: Baked Daily
why.2.body: Every loaf and batch of dairy is made fresh each morning — never yesterday's.
why.3.title: Homemade Quality
why.3.body: A small home kitchen means personal attention in every single product.
why.4.title: Made with Care
why.4.body: Traditional Persian recipes passed down through generations, lovingly preserved.
footer.tagline: Every loaf baked with patience, every drop of cream with care.
about.page.label: Our Story
about.page.title: About Nehmat Bakery
about.page.story.heading: From a Kitchen Table to Your Doorstep
about.page.story.p1: The name Nehmat (نعمت) means blessing and bounty — and that is exactly what we strive to bring to your table every single morning. Our bakery started as a family tradition: a warm kitchen, the scent of freshly baked bread filling the house before sunrise, and neighbours knocking on the door.
about.page.story.p2: Over the years, those neighbourly requests became a small but proud home business. Today we bake traditional white and whole-wheat Taftoon flatbreads alongside pure homemade dairy products — all crafted in small batches with the same care we've always offered.
about.page.story.p3: We source our flour and milk locally, keep our recipes honest, and refuse to cut corners. There are no preservatives in our bread and no shortcuts in our cream. Just real food, made by real hands.
about.page.values.label: What We Stand For
about.page.values.heading: Our Values
about.page.value.1.title: Honest Ingredients
about.page.value.1.body: We use only natural, locally sourced ingredients — flour, water, salt, and fresh whole milk. Nothing hidden. Nothing artificial.
about.page.value.2.title: Time & Patience
about.page.value.2.body: Good bread cannot be rushed. We give every dough the time it needs to develop flavour and achieve the perfect texture.
about.page.value.3.title: Home Kitchen Warmth
about.page.value.3.body: Our small size is our greatest strength. Every loaf, every jar of cream gets hands-on attention that a large factory never could.
about.page.value.4.title: Persian Heritage
about.page.value.4.body: Taftoon bread has been a staple of Persian breakfast for centuries. We honour that legacy by preserving its authentic taste and texture.
about.page.value.5.title: Zero Waste
about.page.value.5.body: We bake to order and in small batches to avoid waste — better for you and better for the environment.
about.page.value.6.title: Community First
about.page.value.6.body: Our customers are our neighbours. We take pride in being a trusted part of the community that feeds us.
contact.page.label: Get In Touch
contact.page.title: Contact Us
contact.page.heading: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.page.subtext: Whether you'd like to place an order, ask about our products, or simply say hello — we're always happy to chat.
